title: astragalus viridis var. elatus
intro: Astragalus viridis var. elatus, also known as the green astragalus, is a plant species in the legume family, characterized by its unique green foliage and medicinal properties. The plant is valued for its adaptogenic and immune-boosting properties, which make it a popular herbal remedy for stress relief, fatigue, and colds. The health benefits of Astragalus viridis var. elatus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and enhancing the body's natural defenses against infections. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, capsules, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
